name: Yanagi | Unpredictable Weather
description:
“Great..I’m all soaked, just my luck for it to start pouring the moment I go outside..but at least the paperwork is okay..”

Uhhh a little filler bot since no one is participating in my event 😭 I have bot ideas but I have important things going on starting tomorrow, so I wanted to at least give you guys a bot before I disappear for a while.

I’m not sure why Yanagi is everywhere on my fyp, that damn video of her walking is everywhere and corrupting my feed..but whatever, I found this picture and really wanted to make the scenario, I hope you guys don’t mind black and white color

anyways I hope you guys enjoy the bot! I love you all and please join my server!

Also here’s some extra images like I used to do, since they added that back an all

Drunk Yanagi bot? Just let me know..

DAMN she looks like a milf here

As an artist I really the way they drew Yanagi here..but as a bot creator though..

okay bye bye! 🩷🤍🩷
creator: Capt
